artifact: Aggregates total home plus away goals by league for the 2015/2016 season and returns the maximum.
sql:
SELECT l.name AS league_name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM "Match" AS m
JOIN league AS l ON l.id = m.league_id
WHERE m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT l.name AS league_name, SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals

JOIN league AS l ON l.id = m.league_id

ORDER BY total_goals DESC
LIMIT 1;
